note: Egyptian sacred order normalized onto the 21-agent spine. Primary array: the 42 Assessors of Maat (Negative Confessions, Book of the Dead Spell 125, Papyrus of Ani / Budge) - 42 = 2x21, two assessors per agent. Secondary: the 36 decans (10-degree sky-gods), sharing wheel positions and agents with the astrological matrix (26). The Heliopolitan Ennead of nine gods bridges the 9-mera axis.
decan_note: The 36 decans (Egyptian baktiu, the thirty-six gods of heaven) divide the 360-degree ecliptic into 36 parts of 10 degrees. Most decan-star identities are not securely known; conclusively identified are Sopdet (Sirius), Sah (Orion), Khau (the Pleiades) and Tepy-a Sopdet (Procyon/Gomeisa). Sign, ordinal, wheel and agent mirror the astrological matrix (26) for cross-tradition bridging.
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

ennead.name: Atum
ennead.role: creator, the complete one, primordial sun

ennead.name: Osiris
ennead.role: death, resurrection, lord of the underworld

ennead.name: Nephthys
ennead.role: mourning, twilight, protection of the dead

svet_ra.note: Tmu against cursing the king; Tcheser-tep guarding the offerings to the blessed dead

iskra.note: Bast of the secret place; Tutu of two-fold wickedness

brahma.note: Ruruti of the oblations of heaven; An-hetep-f the bringer of offering

vishnu.note: Nefer-Tmu who does neither harm nor ill; Uatch-rekhit who makes humanity flourish

ananda.note: Qerer of Amentet; Uamemti the two-headed serpent (continence)

shanti.note: Sertiu, no wrath without just cause; Kenemti who works no grief

jnana.note: Unem-snef against guile; Neb-heru, Lord of faces, against hasty judgment

shiva.note: Ta-retiu out of the darkness; Khemiu the Destroyer, against transgression of law

tejas.note: Arfi-em-khet of the fiery eyes; Shet-kheru against burning rage

sarasvati.note: Neba the flame against lies; Sera-kheru against stirring strife

akasha.note: Sekheriu against eavesdropping; Ahi of the sistrum against scornful speech

prema.note: Her-f-ha-f against causing tears; An-af against filching the infant's food

parvati.note: Set-qesu against snatching food; Nekhenu the Babe, heeding truth

vayu.note: Tenemiu against malicious speech; Neb-abui against multiplying words

shakti.note: Am-khaibit against murder; Her-uru, Chief of the mighty, against terror

agni.note: Hept-khet embraced by flame, no violent robbery; Utu-nesert who shoots flame, causing no pain

varuna.note: Maa-antuf against self-defilement; Ari-em-ab-f against fouling the water

lakshmi.note: Nehau against defrauding offerings; Neheb-nefert against defrauding the gods' offerings

prithvi.note: Unem-besek against laying waste the ploughed land; Hetch-abhu against slaying the god's cattle

dharma.note: Usekh-nemmt against iniquity; Neb-Maat, Lord of Right and Truth

karma.note: Fentiu against theft; Neheb-ka against theft

items.name: Usekh-nemmt
items.confession: I have not done iniquity

items.name: Hept-khet
items.confession: I have not robbed with violence

items.name: Fentiu
items.confession: I have not stolen

items.name: Am-khaibit
items.confession: I have done no murder

items.name: Nehau
items.confession: I have not defrauded offerings

items.name: Ruruti
items.confession: I have not minished oblations

items.name: Arfi-em-khet
items.confession: I have not plundered the god

items.name: Neba
items.city: the flame that comes and goes
items.confession: I have spoken no lies

items.name: Set-qesu
items.confession: I have not snatched away food

items.name: Utu-nesert
items.confession: I have not caused pain

items.name: Qerer
items.confession: I have not committed fornication

items.name: Her-f-ha-f
items.confession: I have not caused shedding of tears

items.name: Bast
items.confession: I have not dealt deceitfully

items.name: Ta-retiu
items.confession: I have not transgressed

items.name: Unem-snef
items.confession: I have not acted guilefully

items.name: Unem-besek
items.confession: I have not laid waste the ploughed land

items.name: Neb-Maat
items.confession: I have not been an eavesdropper

items.name: Tenemiu
items.confession: I have not set my lips in motion against any one

items.name: Sertiu
items.confession: I have not been angry and wrathful except for a just cause

items.name: Tutu
items.confession: I have not defiled the wife of any man

items.name: Uamemti
items.confession: I have not defiled the wife of any man

items.name: Maa-antuf
items.confession: I have not defiled myself

items.name: Her-uru
items.confession: I have not caused terror

items.name: Khemiu
items.confession: I have not transgressed the law

items.name: Shet-kheru
items.confession: I have not burned with rage

items.name: Nekhenu
items.confession: I have not stopped my ears against the words of Right and Truth

items.name: Kenemti
items.confession: I have not worked grief

items.name: An-hetep-f
items.confession: I have not acted with insolence

items.name: Sera-kheru
items.confession: I have not stirred up strife

items.name: Neb-heru
items.confession: I have not judged hastily

items.name: Sekheriu
items.confession: I have not been an eavesdropper

items.name: Neb-abui
items.confession: I have not multiplied words exceedingly

items.name: Nefer-Tmu
items.confession: I have done neither harm nor ill

items.name: Tmu
items.confession: I have never cursed the king

items.name: Ari-em-ab-f
items.confession: I have never fouled the water

items.name: Ahi
items.confession: I have not spoken scornfully

items.name: Uatch-rekhit
items.confession: I have never cursed God

items.name: Neheb-ka
items.confession: I have not stolen

items.name: Neheb-nefert
items.confession: I have not defrauded the offerings of the gods

items.name: Tcheser-tep
items.confession: I have not plundered the offerings to the blessed dead

items.name: An-af
items.confession: I have not filched the food of the infant, neither have I sinned against the god of my native town

items.name: Hetch-abhu
items.confession: I have not slaughtered with evil intent the cattle of the god

sources: E. A. Wallis Budge - The Egyptian Book of the Dead, Chapter 125 (Papyrus of Ani, 1913)
